title: cordia cylindristachya var. graveolens
intro: Cordia cylindristachya var. graveolens, also known as the Fragrant Bead Tree or Wild Plum, is a shrub native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cordia cylindristachya var. graveolens include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
